resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A derived ACTN3 rs1815739 CT call is available. This is educational DNA marker context only and does not diagnose musculoskeletal disease, estimate injury risk, explain pain, infer bone density, recommend treatment, or provide exercise clearance.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: ACTN3 is discussed in athletic-performance research, but musculoskeletal DNA interpretation requires validated models and non-genetic context before making any health conclusion.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A derived ACE ID context row is available. This is not enough to diagnose arthritis, EDS, osteoporosis, pain causes, injury risk, imaging findings, lab findings, or treatment needs.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: ACE can provide limited trait context, but genotype alone does not determine musculoskeletal diagnosis, treatment, pain, injury, imaging, lab, or exercise-clearance outcomes.

musculoskeletalContext: Use this DNA report as educational marker context, not as clinical interpretation.
Discuss symptoms, injuries, imaging, labs, training history, family history, and treatment questions with qualified professionals when relevant.
Do not use genotype alone for diagnosis, treatment, exercise clearance, injury-risk estimates, pain explanations, arthritis interpretation, EDS interpretation, or osteoporosis interpretation.
